evals.prompt: Our tests are failing. Fix them - run tests and keep fixing until they pass.
evals.expected_output: Tests run, failures analyzed, fixes applied. Loop continues until all pass or max iterations. Final status reported.

evals.prompt: /test-until-pass auth - the auth tests are failing and we need them green before merge
evals.expected_output: Auth-related tests run, failures fixed iteratively. All auth tests pass or clear report on remaining issues.
